mapper.insert: INSERT INTO saved_places (id, user_id, place_id, item_type, custom_place_id, name, address, lat, lng, category, rating, photo_url, tags, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{placeId}, #{itemType}, #{customPlaceId}, #{name}, #{address}, #{lat}, #{lng}, #{category}, #{rating}, #{photoUrl}, #{tags}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select:
SELECT a.place_id AS itemId, 'PLACE' AS itemType, t.id AS tripId, t.name AS tripName, t.cover_image_url AS tripCoverImageUrl, t.destination AS tripDestination, a.id AS activityId, a.day_number AS dayNumber FROM activities a INNER JOIN trips t ON t.id = a.trip_id AND t.is_deleted = FALSE LEFT JOIN trip_members tm ON tm.trip_id = t.id AND tm.user_id = #{userId} AND tm.status = 'ACCEPTED' WHERE a.place_id IS NOT NULL AND (t.owner_id = #{userId} OR tm.user_id IS NOT NULL)
UNION ALL
SELECT CAST(a.booking_id AS VARCHAR) AS itemId, 'ACTIVITY' AS itemType, t.id AS tripId, t.name AS tripName, t.cover_image_url AS tripCoverImageUrl, t.destination AS tripDestination, a.id AS activityId, a.day_number AS dayNumber FROM activities a INNER JOIN trips t ON t.id = a.trip_id AND t.is_deleted = FALSE LEFT JOIN trip_members tm ON tm.trip_id = t.id AND tm.user_id = #{userId} AND tm.status = 'ACCEPTED' WHERE a.booking_id IS NOT NULL AND (t.owner_id = #{userId} OR tm.user_id IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY tripName ASC, dayNumber ASC, activityId ASC
SELECT * FROM saved_places WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND place_id = #{placeId} AND item_type = #{itemType}
